mode_cards.top_feature_correlations: S_score:+0.8505 ; J_pressure:-0.8443 ; divergence:-0.8120 ; C:+0.7897 ; sealed:+0.7897 ; R_Omega:+0.7375

equivariance.full_signed_fano_group_status: not certified: v8/v9 bundles do not include explicit signed-Fano permutation generators on the 16 builder and 16 jabber strategy sets
equivariance.tested_group: maximal row/column permutation subgroup preserving the v8 Fano-coordinate flag tensor exactly

classification.short: R_Omega is a low-dimensional curvature band: two dominant singular modes, a monodromy correction, and a stabilizer-breaking tail.
classification.factorization: It factors strongly but not exactly through Omega_J, D_J, and M_CVX; the combined block explains 96.29% of residual Frobenius energy.
classification.equivariance: The residual is not invariant under the v8-visible flag stabilizer; 64.12% of its energy lies in the stabilizer-breaking component. Full signed-Fano equivariance remains uncertified without explicit generators.

fano_layer.canonical_fano_plane: points are nonzero vectors in F2^3; lines are triples {a,b,a+b}
fano_layer.strategy_label_action_status: not derivable from v8/v9: the bundles provide Fano-zone weights on the 16x16 strategy pairs, but not a signed-Fano permutation representation on the 16 builder and 16 jabber labels
fano_layer.equivariance_status: canonical Fano flag stabilizer is included; full signed-Fano equivariance on R_Omega remains uncertified until label permutations are supplied

fano_6j_contraction.contraction: Fano plane F7 minus null point gives six tetrahedral edge labels

four_nonnull_lines_as_vertex_stars.interpretation: one of the four 3-edge stars / opposite face normals in K4
one of the four 3-edge stars / opposite face normals in K4
one of the four 3-edge stars / opposite face normals in K4
one of the four 3-edge stars / opposite face normals in K4

sixj.interpretation: the six contracted Fano channels are the six tetrahedral edge labels of a 6j symbol

fano_6j_contraction.caveat: The 16x16 strategy-label signed action is still not present in v8; this construction supplies the canonical Fano->6j contraction and tests the induced six-channel operator.

v13_decisive_tests.input_basis: v8 flag-simplex data, v9 R_Omega, v12 Fano-to-6j contraction
v13_decisive_tests.caveat: The v8 bundle resolves Fano weights only at three-zone level; seven-point distributions are reconstructed by uniform splitting inside L3\P1 and F7\L3. Results depending on all seven points are therefore certified relative to that v8 reconstruction.

seven_null_point_sweep.interpretation: Nullifying a non-clean point preserves the large P1 mass as an edge channel; nullifying the clean point erases the dominant clean corridor and leaves only the small non-null curvature shadow.

shuffle_controls.interpretation: Controls compare the observed 6j-fit against same-spectrum random orientations, row/column label scrambles, and Fano-weight strategy shuffles.

v14_curvature_descent.basis: v13 seven-null Fano-to-6j operators plus v9 R_Omega matrix
v14_curvature_descent.caveat: Seven-point Fano distributions are reconstructed from v8 three-zone data by uniform splitting inside L3\P1 and F7\L3; all seven-point/null-point claims are relative to that reconstruction.
v14_curvature_descent.full_WD6_projection_theorem: For conjugation on 6x6 edge operators, full W(D6) invariants are exactly scalar diagonal matrices (trace(A)/6)I. Thus WD6-invariant energy is trace(A)^2/(6||A||_F^2).

interpretation.WD6: The six-channel residual is almost entirely outside full W(D6)-invariant scalar-diagonal form; it selects a chamber rather than a Regge-invariant scalar.
interpretation.quotient_descent: Pair3 descent measures whether the six signed channels collapse to B,V,S. Low descent means Pin/signed level curvature; high descent means CY/pair quotient curvature.
interpretation.curvature: Nonzero triangle curl and non-exact skew component turn the curvature language into an actual finite 1-form obstruction test.
interpretation.rank_tail: The rank-4 e-lock tail can be audited by curvature/descent metrics in rank_truncation_curvature_obstruction.csv.
